# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import "reflect-metadata";
import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import { createConnection, getRepository, Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, Index, ConnectionOptions } from "typeorm";

@Entity({ name: "products" })
@Index(["sku"], { unique: true })
class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 64 })
  sku!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 255 })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "text", nullable: true })
  description!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 128, nullable: true })
  brand!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 128, nullable: true })
  category!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 64, nullable: true })
  color!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 64, nullable: true })
  size!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 64, nullable: true })
  material!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "numeric", precision: 12, scale: 2 })
  price!: string;

  @Column({ type: "int", default: 0 })
  stock!: number;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  isActive!: boolean;

  @Column({ type: "timestamp", default: () => "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" })
  createdAt!: Date;

  @Column({ type: "timestamp", default: () => "CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" })
  updatedAt!: Date;
}

type SortField = "relevance" | "price" | "createdAt" | "name";
type SortDir = "asc" | "desc";

function toStringArray(v: unknown): string[] {
  if (v == null) return [];
  if (Array.isArray(v)) return v.flatMap(toStringArray);
  if (typeof v === "string") {
    return v
      .split(",")
      .map((s) => s.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
  }
  return [String(v)];
}

function toBoolean(v: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  if (v == null) return undefined;
  if (typeof v === "boolean") return v;
  if (typeof v === "string") {
    const s = v.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (["true", "1", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(s)) return true;
    if (["false", "0", "no", "n", "off"].includes(s)) return false;
  }
  if (typeof v === "number") return v !== 0;
  return undefined;
}

function toNumber(v: unknown): number | undefined {
  if (v == null) return undefined;
  const n = typeof v === "number" ? v : Number(String(v));
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function clamp(n: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));
}

function escapeLike(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/[%_\\]/g, (m) => "\\" + m);
}

function quoteIdent(ident: string): string {
  if (!/^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$/.test(ident)) throw new Error("Invalid identifier");
  return `"${ident}"`;
}

function buildInClause(values: string[], params: unknown[]): string {
  const clean = values.map((v) => v.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if (clean.length === 0) return "(NULL)";
  const placeholders = clean.map((v) => {
    params.push(v);
    return `$${params.length}`;
  });
  return `(${placeholders.join(",")})`;
}

function buildSearchQuery(req: Request): { sql: string; countSql: string; params: unknown[]; countParams: unknown[] } {
  const q = typeof req.query.q === "string" ? req.query.q.trim() : undefined;
  const sku = typeof req.query.sku === "string" ? req.query.sku.trim() : undefined;

  const categories = toStringArray(req.query.category);
  const brands = toStringArray(req.query.brand);
  const colors = toStringArray(req.query.color);
  const sizes = toStringArray(req.query.size);
  const materials = toStringArray(req.query.material);

  const minPrice = toNumber(req.query.minPrice);
  const maxPrice = toNumber(req.query.maxPrice);
  const inStock = toBoolean(req.query.inStock);
  const isActive = toBoolean(req.query.isActive);

  const page = clamp(toNumber(req.query.page) ?? 1, 1, 10_000);
  const limit = clamp(toNumber(req.query.limit) ?? 20, 1, 200);
  const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

  const sortByRaw = typeof req.query.sortBy === "string" ? req.query.sortBy : "relevance";
  const sortDirRaw = typeof req.query.sortDir === "string" ? req.query.sortDir : "desc";
  const sortBy: SortField = (["relevance", "price", "createdAt", "name"] as const).includes(sortByRaw as SortField)
    ? (sortByRaw as SortField)
    : "relevance";
  const sortDir: SortDir = (["asc", "desc"] as const).includes(sortDirRaw.toLowerCase() as SortDir)
    ? (sortDirRaw.toLowerCase() as SortDir)
    : "desc";

  const params: unknown[] = [];
  const where: string[] = [];

  if (sku) {
    params.push(sku);
    where.push(`p.sku = $${params.length}`);
  }

  if (q) {
    const qLike = `%${escapeLike(q)}%`;
    params.push(qLike);
    const p1 = `$${params.length}`;
    params.push(qLike);
    const p2 = `$${params.length}`;
    params.push(qLike);
    const p3 = `$${params.length}`;
    where.push(`(p.name ILIKE ${p1} ESCAPE '\\' OR p.description ILIKE ${p2} ESCAPE '\\' OR p.brand ILIKE ${p3} ESCAPE '\\')`);
  }

  if (categories.length) where.push(`p.category IN ${buildInClause(categories, params)}`);
  if (brands.length) where.push(`p.brand IN ${buildInClause(brands, params)}`);
  if (colors.length) where.push(`p.color IN ${buildInClause(colors, params)}`);
  if (sizes.length) where.push(`p.size IN ${buildInClause(sizes, params)}`);
  if (materials.length) where.push(`p.material IN ${buildInClause(materials, params)}`);

  if (minPrice != null) {
    params.push(minPrice);
    where.push(`p.price >= $${params.length}`);
  }
  if (maxPrice != null) {
    params.push(maxPrice);
    where.push(`p.price <= $${params.length}`);
  }

  if (inStock != null) {
    where.push(inStock ? `p.stock > 0` : `p.stock <= 0`);
  }

  if (isActive != null) {
    params.push(isActive);
    where.push(`p."isActive" = $${params.length}`);
  }

  const whereSql = where.length ? `WHERE ${where.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  let relevanceSelect = `NULL::float as relevance`;
  let relevanceOrder = ``;
  if (q) {
    const qLike = `%${escapeLike(q)}%`;
    const relParams: string[] = [];
    params.push(qLike);
    relParams.push(`(CASE WHEN p.name ILIKE $${params.length} ESCAPE '\\' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END)`);
    params.push(qLike);
    relParams.push(`(CASE WHEN p.brand ILIKE $${params.length} ESCAPE '\\' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END)`);
    params.push(qLike);
    relParams.push(`(CASE WHEN p.description ILIKE $${params.length} ESCAPE '\\' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)`);
    relevanceSelect = `${relParams.join(" + ")} as relevance`;
    relevanceOrder = `relevance DESC, `;
  }

  const allowedSortCols: Record<Exclude<SortField, "relevance">, string> = {
    price: `p.price`,
    createdAt: `p."createdAt"`,
    name: `p.name`,
  };

  const orderBy =
    sortBy === "relevance"
      ? `ORDER BY ${relevanceOrder} p."updatedAt" DESC, p.id DESC`
      : `ORDER BY ${allowedSortCols[sortBy as Exclude<SortField, "relevance">]} ${sortDir.toUpperCase()}, p.id DESC`;

  params.push(limit);
  const limitParam = `$${params.length}`;
  params.push(offset);
  const offsetParam = `$${params.length}`;

  const sql = `
    SELECT
      p.id,
      p.sku,
      p.name,
      p.description,
      p.brand,
      p.category,
      p.color,
      p.size,
      p.material,
      p.price,
      p.stock,
      p."isActive",
      p."createdAt",
      p."updatedAt",
      ${relevanceSelect}
    FROM products p
    ${whereSql}
    ${orderBy}
    LIMIT ${limitParam} OFFSET ${offsetParam}
  `.trim();

  const countParams = params.slice(0, params.length - 2);
  const countSql = `
    SELECT COUNT(*)::int as count
    FROM products p
    ${whereSql}
  `.trim();

  return { sql, countSql, params, countParams };
}

function errorHandler(err: unknown, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) {
  const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
  res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal Server Error", message });
}

async function main() {
  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json());

  const port = Number(process.env.PORT || 3000);

  const dbType = (process.env.DB_TYPE || "postgres") as ConnectionOptions["type"];
  const connectionOpts: ConnectionOptions = {
    type: dbType,
    url: process.env.DATABASE_URL,
    host: process.env.DB_HOST,
    port: process.env.DB_PORT ? Number(process.env.DB_PORT) : undefined,
    username: process.env.DB_USER,
    password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD,
    database: process.env.DB_NAME,
    synchronize: false,
    logging: false,
    entities: [Product],
  };

  await createConnection(connectionOpts);

  app.get("/api/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
    try {
      const { sql, countSql, params, countParams } = buildSearchQuery(req);
      const repo = getRepository(Product);

      const [rows, countRows] = await Promise.all([
        repo.query(sql, params),
        repo.query(countSql, countParams),
      ]);

      const count = Array.isArray(countRows) && countRows[0] ? Number(countRows[0].count) : 0;

      const page = clamp(toNumber(req.query.page) ?? 1, 1, 10_000);
      const limit = clamp(toNumber(req.query.limit) ?? 20, 1, 200);

      res.json({
        page,
        limit,
        total: count,
        items: rows,
      });
    } catch (e) {
      next(e);
    }
  });

  app.get("/health", (_req, res) => res.json({ ok: true }));

  app.use(errorHandler);

  app.listen(port, () => {
    // server started
  });
}

main().catch((err) => {
  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
  console.error(err);
  process.exit(1);
});
